userMessage: Add frequency and amplitude measurements on CH1 and query both results

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"CH1 Frequency and Amplitude Measurements","description":"Connects to an MSO4/5/6 scope, clears existing measurements to make MEAS1 and MEAS2 deterministic, adds frequency and amplitude measurements on CH1, queries both current acquisition results, and disconnects.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"s1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":[],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"g2","type":"group","label":"Add Measurements","params":{},"children":[{"id":"s3","type":"write","label":"Clear Existing Measurements","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:DELETEALL"}},{"id":"s4","type":"write","label":"Add Frequency Measurement","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS FREQUENCY"}},{"id":"s5","type":"write","label":"Add Amplitude Measurement","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS AMPLITUDE"}},{"id":"s6","type":"write","label":"Set MEAS1 Source to CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOURCE CH1"}},{"id":"s7","type":"write","label":"Set MEAS2 Source to CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:SOURCE CH1"}},{"id":"s8","type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"}}]},{"id":"g9","type":"group","label":"Read Results","params":{},"children":[{"id":"s10","type":"query","label":"Read CH1 Frequency","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_frequency"}},{"id":"s11","type":"query","label":"Read CH1 Amplitude","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_amplitude"}},{"id":"s12","type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"}}]},{"id":"s13","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":[]}}]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.

flow.name: CH1 Frequency and Amplitude Measurements
flow.description: Connects to an MSO4/5/6 scope, clears existing measurements to make MEAS1 and MEAS2 deterministic, adds frequency and amplitude measurements on CH1, queries both current acquisition results, and disconnects.
